# Noqta — نقطة

## What is Noqta?
Noqta (نقطة) is a QR menu and digital ordering platform built specifically for Palestinian restaurants. It allows restaurant customers to scan a QR code, browse an Arabic/English menu, and place orders directly — no app download required.

## Who is it for?
Palestinian restaurants, cafes, food vendors, and food trucks in the West Bank who want to:
- Replace manual WhatsApp ordering with a digital QR menu
- Auto-print orders to their kitchen printer
- Track sales analytics and top-selling items
- Run a customer loyalty program
- Manage delivery zones and pickup orders

## Key Features
- Bilingual QR menu (Arabic + English, RTL/LTR)
- Automatic kitchen printer integration (ESC/POS, Ethernet)
- Real-time sales analytics dashboard
- Customer loyalty points system
- Delivery zone management with custom fees
- Multi-location support
- Restaurant admin dashboard
- Super admin panel for managing multiple restaurants

## Pricing
Founding offer: $1,000 one-time for the first year (limited spots)
Includes: full setup, onboarding, and direct technical support

## Who built it?
Noqta is built and operated by AtharCo, a Palestinian technology company based in Ramallah, West Bank.

## Contact
To request a demo or learn more, contact via WhatsApp: +970599488371
Website: https://noqta.ps (coming soon)
